info.description: Categories for items sold in the shop (jewellery, crystals, sage, gifts). Top-level categories appear as the shop nav. Use 'parent' to create sub-categories like Bracelets under Jewellery.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier, auto-derived from the name.

parent.description: Optional parent category. Leave blank for top-level categories (Jewellery, Crystals, etc.). Set to 'Jewellery' for sub-categories like Bracelets / Earrings / Necklaces / Charms.

children.description: Auto-populated by Strapi when other categories set this as their parent. No need to edit directly.

description.description: Optional short description shown on the category page above the product grid.

is_visible_in_nav.description: Show this category in the shop dropdown menu. Untick to keep the category for internal organisation but hide from the nav.

sort_order.description: Lower numbers appear first in nav menus and on the shop page.

upsells.description: Up to 3 'next step' cards shown at the bottom of this page. Each card has an image + label + short blurb + link. Leave empty to hide the upsell block entirely. Example use: on the About page, point to the Reset Room and Reset Letters.
